title: ferulago capillaris
intro: Ferulago capillaris, also known as rock rose or heliotropium, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Ferulago capillaris include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. Ferulago capillaris is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application for skin issues due to its antiseptic properties.
